[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
Throughout the current week, the ship recycling industry has exhibited a lackluster performance across various recycling destinations. In the context of India, it is
evident that the market has encountered a slowed pace, characterized by a persistent downward trajectory. This trend has been particularly observed in the local
steel market, which has exhibited a gradual decline.
